name: ELF Binary Analyzer
description: Static triage of ELF binaries (Linux/BSD) with pyelftools: class/arch/type, sections + per-section entropy (packing), needed libraries, RPATH/RUNPATH, imported symbols classified by capability (network/exec/inject/load/crypto), and hardening (PIE/NX/RELRO). Emits BINARY.* atoms. Reads structure only — never runs the binary.

prerequisites.install_hint: Install Python 3.8+. pyelftools is vendored (pure-python), so no network/install at analysis time.

safety.notes: Static structural parse (pyelftools). Never loads, links, maps, or executes the binary.

payload.note: Vendored via `uv pip install --target runtime/site` (pure-python, portable). Companion to hex-view for the 'I have a binary' case; emits BINARY.* atoms that map onto an MCD reading.
